caption: Shoutout to @ryan.torres.rdh for the incredibly thorough cleaning today! Zero judgment, tons of education. If you need a hygienist in Dearborn, this is your person. #LakewoodFamilyDentistry #DearbornMI
National Dental Hygienists Week! Celebrating all the incredible RDHs keeping our smiles healthy. Tag your favorite hygienist 🦷 @adha_1923 @ryan.torres.rdh #NDHW2026 #DentalHygiene
Just booked my cleaning at Lakewood Family Dentistry on the recommendation of @ryan.torres.rdh's Instagram tips. Finally committing to that six-month schedule! #OralHealth #DearbornMI
Detroit Tigers opening week and @ryan.torres.rdh already has section 114 seats locked in for the full homestand. Love this guy. Go Tigers! ⚾ #DetroitTigers #ComericaPark
Great seeing @ryan.torres.rdh at the Michigan Dental Association CE conference today. Solid session on ultrasonic scaling. #MDAConference #DentalHygiene #ContinuingEducation
RDH tip of the week courtesy of @ryan.torres.rdh: ultrasonic scalers aren't just for deep cleanings. Proper power settings matter at every recall appointment. 🤷‍♂️ #RDH #DentalHygieneTips

Sunday dinner at the Torres house and the lasagna did NOT disappoint. @ryan.torres.rdh your mom is an absolute legend. Italian-American comfort food at its finest 🍷🍝 #ItalianFood #FamilyDinner #Dearborn
Tigers walk-off in the 9th! Section 114 went WILD. Shoutout to @ryan.torres.rdh for the tickets ⚾🔵 #DetroitTigers #ComericaPark #DetroitSports
Metro Detroit wedding venues are STUNNING. @emma.bennett.det and @ryan.torres.rdh are so lucky — can't wait for October! #DetroitWedding #WeddingPlanning #Oct2026

So much respect for dental hygienists. @ryan.torres.rdh just posted the most educational reel about the link between gum disease and heart health. Follow him if you care about your smile! #DentalHealth #RDH
Homemade rigatoni alla Norma night and @ryan.torres.rdh is keeping up the family tradition. That Italian heritage shows in the kitchen 🍝❤️ #ItalianAmerican #HomeCooking #Dearborn
Dearborn Metro area dental professionals — follow @ryan.torres.rdh for practical hygiene content. Refreshing to see a male RDH sharing real clinical tips online. #DentalHygienist #RDH #MichiganDental
Wedding countdown: 138 days! 💍 @ryan.torres.rdh and I are officially in full planning mode. Venue booked, caterer locked in. Now the fun details! #WeddingPlanning #ToBeMarried #October2026
Spotted @ryan.torres.rdh at Supino's in Eastern Market last night. The man knows his pizza. Detroit knows pizza. That's all. 🍕 #DetroitFood #Supinos #EasternMarket
CE webinar recap from @adha_1923: session on managing dental anxiety in adult patients. Great points shared by attendees including @ryan.torres.rdh in the Q&A. #ADHA #DentalHygiene #CE
Nonna's tiramisu recipe officially tested and approved by @ryan.torres.rdh himself. The man has standards. 🍰 #ItalianDessert #FamilyRecipe #TiramisuLovers
Congrats to @ryan.torres.rdh and @emma.bennett.det on your engagement anniversary! One year engaged, four months till the big day 💍 #DetroitCouple #WeddingCountdown #Engaged
Honored to see @ryan.torres.rdh at the ADHA Michigan Component summer meet-up. Dental hygiene leadership in metro Detroit keeps growing. #ADHAMichigan #RDH
Wedding-week countdown is real. @emma.bennett.det and @ryan.torres.rdh — Riverstone Estate is going to be a stunner in October. #DearbornWeddings #October2026
Heartland Free Dental Clinic monthly volunteer shout-out: @ryan.torres.rdh — your patient education page is moving the needle. Thank you. #HeartlandClinic #VolunteerLove
